action_recommendations.rationale: 2 strategy(ies) show edge >= 0.05 vs hypergeometric baseline. Queue for governance watchlist review.
6 strategy(ies) show positive edge vs baseline. Monitor across additional draws before promotion decision.
2 strategy(ies) indistinguishable from random/historical-frequency baseline. Consider replacing with more differentiated strategies.
11 strategy(ies) show positive edge vs baseline. Monitor across additional draws before promotion decision.
1 strategy(ies) consistently below baseline. Do not promote. Consider removal from active replay pool after governance sign-off.
3 strategy(ies) indistinguishable from random/historical-frequency baseline. Consider replacing with more differentiated strategies.
1 strategy(ies) show positive edge vs baseline. Monitor across additional draws before promotion decision.
4 strategy(ies) consistently below baseline. Do not promote. Consider removal from active replay pool after governance sign-off.
6 strategy(ies) indistinguishable from random/historical-frequency baseline. Consider replacing with more differentiated strategies.

limitations: hit_count measures number overlap only; prize-tier weighting not applied
temporal stability across sub-windows not computed (single pooled window)
baseline is hypergeometric expected value E[hits]=k^2/N (simple random)
hit_count==0 rows included in average; REPLAY_ERROR rows excluded from hit avg
3_STAR excluded: Special3 P108 blocked until 37 more prospective draws
BIG_LOTTO special (bonus ball) not predicted by any audited strategy
DAILY_539 special not applicable (game has no separate special ball)

references.p105: DB state acceptance decision (Option A, Special3 evaluation only)
references.p106: Special3 Prospective Evaluation Rerun -- PARTIAL, 63/100 draws
